title: PreferenceEvent
description: BIL preference-learning event emitted by approvals, corrections, reuse, browsing, clipboard, or station routing observations.

source.description: Emitter such as approval_gate, correction_logger, clipboard, browser, station_runner, or bil_server

weight.description: BIL learning strength for this observation

subject.description: File, station, route, document, or preference target being scored
